name: doom-like-game
description: Modern DOOM-like web game built with Babylon.js and TypeScript

scripts.build: pnpm --filter './packages/engine' build && pnpm --filter './packages/game-logic' build && pnpm --filter './packages/weapons' build && pnpm --filter './packages/effects' build && pnpm --filter './apps/web' build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter './packages/engine' build && pnpm --filter './packages/game-logic' build && pnpm --filter './packages/weapons' build && pnpm --filter './packages/effects' build && pnpm --filter './apps/web' typecheck
